## What does this pull request do ?

A one-paragraph description of the change.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest src/test/ -v`)
- [ ] I have added tests for my change (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added or updated comments for every non-obvious line
- [ ] The code follows the style described in CONTRIBUTING.md

## Notes for reviewers

Anything the reviewer should pay special attention to.
